chatDialogueBox.title: Allan
chatDialogueBox.description: I'm here to help you learn responsible AI usage and develop strong AI literacy skills.
chatDialogueBox.welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm Allan, your AI teacher.

predefinedPrompts.description: What are the key principles of responsible AI use?
How can I protect sensitive data when using AI?
What should I know about AI ethics?
How do I explain AI concepts to my team?
